title: Sophisticated Bitter Japanese Fish Chirashi
description: A bitter and aerated Japanese dish featuring white wine and deglaze, made with ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients, served as a chirashi meal prep
instructions: Rinse the sushi-grade fish and cut it into small pieces
Cook the Japanese rice according to the package instructions
In a small saucepan, combine the white wine and rice vinegar and bring to a boil
Reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes to deglaze the sauce
In a large bowl, combine the cooked rice, sesame oil, and dried wakame seaweed
Add the pickled ginger and scallions to the bowl and mix well
Add the cooked fish to the bowl and mix gently
Divide the mixture into individual portions and serve as a chirashi
Garnish with additional scallions and pickled ginger if desired
